InfoContent:
📍 Address Usage
  Symbolic : DB_PC.Receive.Control.Life

  ── Input ──────────────────────────────────────
  I0.0          Bit  (Input bit 0.0)
  IB0           Byte (Input byte 0)
  IW0           Word (Input word 0)
  ID0           DWord(Input double word 0)

  ── Output ─────────────────────────────────────
  Q0.0          Bit
  QB0           Byte
  QW0           Word
  QD0           DWord

  ── Memory (Merker) ─────────────────────────────
  M0.0          Bit
  MB0           Byte
  MW0           Word
  MD0           DWord

  ── Data Block ──────────────────────────────────
  DB1.DBX0.0    Bit
  DB1.DBB0      Byte
  DB1.DBW0      Word
  DB1.DBD4      DWord

  ── Timer — S7-300/400 ──────────────────────────
  T0            Timer 0  (reads S5TIME value)
  T1 … T255     Timer number

  ── Counter — S7-300/400 ────────────────────────
  C0  / Z0      Counter 0  (BCD value)
  C1 … C255     Counter number
  (S7-1200/1500 IEC timer/counter → DB based)

  ── Peripheral I/O ──────────────────────────────
  PIB0 / PQB0   Peripheral Byte I/O
  PIW0 / PQW0   Peripheral Word I/O
  PID0 / PQD0   Peripheral DWord I/O

🔢 Integer Types
  BOOL             :  true / false   or   1 / 0
  BYTE / USINT     :  0 … 255
  SINT             :  -128 … 127
  WORD / UINT      :  0 … 65535
  INT              :  -32768 … 32767
  DWORD / UDINT    :  0 … 4294967295
  DINT             :  -2147483648 … 2147483647
  LWORD / ULINT    :  0 … 18446744073709551615
  LINT             :  -9223372036854775808 … 9223372036854775807

📐 Floating Point Types
  REAL             :  3.14
  LREAL            :  3.14159265358979

🔤 String Types
  CHAR / WCHAR     :  A
  STRING[n]        :  Text  (max n characters)
  WSTRING[n]       :  Text  (max n Unicode chars, S7-1500)

🕐 Time Types
  TIME             :  T#1s_500ms
  S5TIME           :  S5T#1m_30s
  DATE             :  2024-01-15
  TOD              :  12:30:00
  DT               :  DT#2024-01-15-08:30:00
  DTL              :  DTL#2024-01-15-08:30:00

📋 Example symbols.json Definitions
{
  "DB.Bool1"    : { "PhysicalAddress": "DB99.DBX0.0", "DataType": "BOOL",       "DefaultValue": "false" },
  "DB.Byte1"    : { "PhysicalAddress": "DB99.DBB1",   "DataType": "BYTE",       "DefaultValue": "0"    },
  "DB.Int1"     : { "PhysicalAddress": "DB99.DBW6",   "DataType": "INT",        "DefaultValue": "0"    },
  "DB.Real1"    : { "PhysicalAddress": "DB99.DBD30",  "DataType": "REAL",       "DefaultValue": "0.0"  },
  "DB.String1"  : { "PhysicalAddress": "DB99.DBB94",  "DataType": "STRING[20]", "DefaultValue": ""     }
}
